title: To His Muse; Another To The Same.
content:
Tell that brave man, fain thou would'st have access
    To kiss his hands, but that for fearfulness;
    Or else because th'art like a modest bride,
    Ready to blush to death, should he but chide.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To His Muse; Another To The Same."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
